title: Sliding Item
description: A directive that enables horizontal sliding functionality for elements. It provides interactive drag-to-slide behavior with configurable sliding directions and smooth animations. The directive automatically handles pointer events and provides visual feedback during interactions.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using the axSlidingItem directive

props.name: currentX
props.description: A signal that tracks the current horizontal position of the sliding element in pixels.

props.name: stopPoint
props.description: A signal that defines the stopping position for the sliding animation in pixels.

props.name: disableSlidingRight
props.description: When set to true, prevents the element from sliding to the right.

props.name: disableSlidingLeft
props.description: When set to true, prevents the element from sliding to the left.

methods.content:
/**
 * Sets the position of the sliding element.
 *
 * @param pos - The horizontal position in pixels to set the element to
 * @returns void - No return value. The element's transform is updated to the specified position.
 */
setPosition(pos: number): void
